text.title: Predictive Analytics for PM Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Predictive Analytics for PM, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Predictive Analytics for PM — clean application
example.note: pap-2026-W21 — Monte Carlo throughput v3 on Jan-May data; P50/P85/P95 = 2026-08-12/09-04/09-25; calibration 0.82 over 6 priors; owner Iryna V.
